title: TUN device error messages obscure actual failure cause
description: In rust/lichen-gateway/src/tun.rs:47-51, the error message always says 'requires CAP_NET_ADMIN or root' even when the actual error might be /dev/net/tun missing (macOS, container without device, tun module not loaded), fd limit exhausted, etc. Users will waste time checking permissions when the problem is elsewhere. Fix: show actual error code first, then suggest most common cause.
